Petition For An Order Granting Trustee The Independent Power To Sell Real Property Of Trustee Estate ;
Off Calendar Apr-08-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. KELLY DIXON APPEARING FOR THE CONSERVATOR THOMAS LUCAS;

THE COURT INQUIRED WHETHER THERE IS AN OPTION ASIDE FROM SELLING THE REAL PROPERTY. MS. DIXON TALKED ABOUT THE OTHER ALTERNATIVES THAT IS GETTING AN EQUITY LINE OF CREDIT FOR REPAIRING THE PROPERTY AND THEN RENTING OUT THE PROERTY. SHE SAID EVEN IF THE PROPERTY IS BEING RENT OUT AT AROUND $3,500 TO $3,800 PLUS THE INCOME OF THE CONSERVATEE WHICH WOULD BE AROUND $7,000.00. THE CONSERVATEE'S EXPENSES IS AROUND $11,000.OO A MONTH. THE CONSERVATEE HAS DIMENTIA IN PROGRESS AND WOULD WOULD INCUR A DEFICIT OF $4,000 EVERY MONTH WHICH IS NOT FEASIBLE. SHE ALSO INFROMED THE COURT THAT THE CONSERVATOR DID NOT GET ANY RESPONSE FROM CONSERVATEE WHEN ASKED ABOUT THE SALE OF HER HOME. THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE: JOHN DEARMAN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT/SAJJA RAVINANTAPRICHA REPORTER: KATH BERSAMIN, CSR # 11722

Petition For Order Appointing Thomas A. Lucas As Successor Trustee Upon Vacancy In The Office Of Trustee; Bringing Trust Under Court Supervision
Off Calendar Aug-20-2007 Granted Per Written Order
